[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001001000 2
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 1100110001 5
4 1111001110 7
5 1010100100 4
6 0000111100 4
7 1100001101 5
